chatDialogueBox.title: History Chat (Beta)
chatDialogueBox.description: A test version to assist with DSB history topics, errors may occur.
welcomeMessage: I'm the beta version of History Chat. Don't hesitate to ask about various topics, and I'll strive to assist you to the best of my ability.
Keep in mind, this is a beta version, prone to errors and mistakes.

predefinedPrompts.description: Tell me what our vision for the S-train was back in 2004
Describe for me DSB's relationship with Sweden through the years
When was the decision to introduce the travel card system made?
How did air quality complaints evolve from 2017 to 2020?
